description_long: This is a sleek, modern convertible car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a two-door coupe design. The body is predominantly white with black accents, including the hood, roof, and side skirts, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The front features sharp, angular headlights and a sculpted bumper, while the rear is similarly angular with integrated taillights. The wheels are large and multi-spoked, suggesting high performance, and the car sits low to the ground. The roof appears to be a hardtop, likely retractable, and the interior is open, typical of a convertible. The overall design is reminiscent of high-end sports cars, with a focus on speed and style.
description: A modern, white and black convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic body and sharp, angular features. It has a hardtop roof and a two-door coupe design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular headlights, sculpted hood, and aggressive bumper design.
description_view_1: Side and undercarriage view highlighting the low ground clearance, large wheels, and black side skirts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the angular taillights, rear bumper, and the overall width of the car.
description_view_3: Opposite side and undercarriage view, similar to view 1, showing the wheels and side profile.
